dialogueLines.text: Echo, my name is Chime and this place we are right now is not a dream but instead we are in the astral plane.
You have awoken a power that allows you to travel through the astral plane while you are asleep in your astral form.
I saw you talking to all those people at the graveyard today, I heard how sad they were.  I do have some good news though.

All those people they were talking about perished on the same day and since then have been trapped in the astral plane.  With your powers you have the chance to go back and help free these lost souls.
I will serve as your guide on your journey to free these lost souls through the astal plane.
Pressing the hint button will display my message of your current objective.
